sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97485" key="subriasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῡβρι-ασμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ ἐν εὐωχίᾳ θόρυβος</foreign>, Id.; hence restd. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σῡβᾰρισμός</foreign> (<sense id="n97485.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συβαριασμός</ref> </xr>) in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">64</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
